name: Westinghouse Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together.
2. Beat the egg yolks separately.
3. Add the milk to the egg yolks and mix with the sifted dry ingredients until the batter is smooth.
4. Gradually fold in the melted butter.
5. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
6. Preheat the waffle iron.
7. Cook for 3 or 4 minutes, or until golden brown.
This recipe makes 6 waffles.
